image_description: KENYA'S FIRST PRESIDENT MZEE JOMO KENYATTA IS PICTURED SHAKING HANDS WITH KENYA'S THIRD VICE-PRESIDENT DANIEL MOI (RIGHT) AFTER APPOINTING HIM THE CHIEF SCOUT OF KENYA, JUNE 1967
image_caption: MZEE KENYATTA IS PICTURED SHAKING HANDS WITH MR. MOI AFTER APPOINTING HIM THE CHIEF SCOUTS OF KENYA
image_keywords: PRESIDENT JOMO KENYATTA, MOI,SCOUTS OF KENYA

image_description: the colonial secretary,  MR. REGINALD MAUDLING, is seen meeting the two ministers of state for colonial affairs, mr ronald ngala (left) and mr jomo kenyatta (c) on arrival at nairobi airport on friday, 6th july 1962.
image_headline: cOLONIAL SECRETARY meets ministers of state for colonial affairs
image_caption: ON HIS ARRIVAL AT NAIROBI AIRPORT TODAY (FRIDAY JULY 6TH 1962), THE COLONIAL SECRETARY, MR. REGINALD MAULDLING, IS SEEN MEETING THE TWO MINISTERS OF STATE FOR CONSTITUTIONAL AFFAIRS. ON THE LEFT IS MR. RONALD G NGALLA  AND IN THE CENTER IS MR. JOMO KENYATTA.
image_keywords: 1349/22, MR. JOMO KENYATTA, COLONIAL SECRETARY, REGINALD MAUDLING, MR. RONALD G NGALA, nairobi airport

image_description: THE GOVERNOR OF KENYA, MALCOLM MACDONALD (LEFT), THE SPEAKER OF SENATE MR. TIMOTHY MWINGA CHOKWE(CENTER) AND PRIME MINISTER JOMO KENYATTA ARRIVING AT PARLIAMENT BUILDINGS FOR THE STATE OPENING OF PARLIAMENT. PARTLY HIDDEN BEHIND KENYATTA IS SPEAKER OF PARLIAMENT HUMPHREY SLADE, JUNE 1963.
image_caption: THE GOVENOR OF KENYA MR. MALCOLM  MACDONALD ESCORTED INTO PARLIAMENT BUILDINDS  FOR THE STATE OPENING OF PARLIAMENT BY THE SPEAKER OF THE SENATE, MR. T. C.M.C CHOKWE. THE PRIME MINISTER MR. JOMO KENYATTA WAS ESCORTED BY THE SPEAKER OF THE HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES, MR. H. SLADE (OBSCURED)
image_keywords: 1397/55,GOVERNOR OF KENYA, SPEAKER OF SENATE, MWINGA CHOKWE, JOMO KENYATTA, HUMPHREY SLADE

image_description: THE MAYOR OF WEST BERLIN, HERR BRANDT PRESENTING A COPPER SALVER TO PRIME MINSTER OF KENYA MZEE JOMO KENYATTA, NOVEMBER 1963
image_headline: MAYOR HERR BRANDT PRESENTING COPPER SALVER TO MR. JOMO KENYATTA
image_caption: THE MAYOR OF WEST BERLIN, HERR BRANDT, PRESENTED A COPPER SALVER TO THE PRIME MINISTER, MR. JOMO KENYATTA WHEN HE VISITED KENYA IN NOVEMBER, 1963
image_keywords: 1398/243, PRIME MINISTER JOMO KENYATTA, MAYOR OF WEST BERLIN, HERR BANDIT

image_description: THE PRIME MINISTER, JOMO KENYATTA,SEEN WITH THE PRINCIPAL OF EGERTON COLLEGE, MAURICE AGAR BARRETT(CENTRE) AND SIR MICHAEL BLUNDELL (LEFT) DURING THE PRIME MINISTER'S VISIT TO THE COLLEGE,  DECEMBER 1963

image_caption: THE PRIME MINISTER,MR. JOMO KENYATTA,SEEN WITH THE PRINCIPAL OF EGERTON COLLEGE, MR.A. BARRETT(CENTRE) AND SIR MICHAEL BLUNDELL DURING HIS VISIT TO THE COLLEGE.

image_description: PRIME MINISTER, MZEE JOMO KENYATTA WITH SIR MICHAEL BLUNDELL AT EGERTON AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE, DECEMBER 1963

image_description: THE PRIME MINISTER JOMO KENYATTA(LEFT)  WITH THE BARCLAY'S BANK LOCAL DIRECTOR,  H.G. ASPINACE ON DECEMBER 1963 AT EGERTON COLLEGE NJORO. THE PRIME MINISTER  RECEIVED A DONATION OF 8000 BRITISH POUNDS FROM THE DIRECTOR AT THE OCCASION FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN ENDOWMENT FUND.
image_headline: PRIME MINISTER JOMO KENYATTA RECEIVES A CHEQUE FROM BARCLAY'S BANK
image_caption: DURING HIS VISIT TO EGERTON COLLEGE,THE PRIME MINISTER, MR. JOMO KENYATTA RECEIVED A CHEQUE FOR Â£8,000 FROM BARCLAY'S BANK (D.C.O) TOWARDS THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN ENDOWMENT FUND. HE IS SEEN HERE WITH A LOCAL DIRECTOR OT THE BANK IN EAST AFRICA, MR. H.G. ASPINACE.
image_keywords: 1398/254,PRIME MINISTER KENYATTA, H.G. ASPINACE, EGERTON COLLEGE,BARCLAY'S BANK

image_description: THE PRIME MINISTER JOMO KENYATTA RECEIVES A CHEQUE FOR Â£1,500 FROM THE BANK OF INDIA LTD. HE IS SEEN BEING PRESENTED WITH A CARVED IVORY LAMP BY MR. D.H. ENGINEER AS A TOKEN OF GOOD WILL FROM INDIA
image_headline: PRIME MINISTER MR. JOMO KENYATTA RECEIVES A CHEQUE  AND CARVED IVORY
image_caption: THE PRIME MINISTER, MR. JOMO KENYATTA RECEIVED A CHEQUE FOR Â£1,500 FROM THE BANK OF INDIA LTD. HE IS SEEN HERE (LEFT) BEING PRESENTED WITH A CARVED IVORY LAMP BY MR. D.H. ENGINEER AS A TOKEN OF GOODWILL FROM INDIA.
image_keywords: 1398/328, PRIME MINISTER JOMO KENYATTA, D.H. ENGINEER, BANK OF INDIA LTD, INDIA.

image_description: PART OF CROWD,PRIME MINISTER MR. JOMO KENYATTA(RIGHT) AND MINISTER OF JUSTICE, MR. TOM MBOYA(THIRD RIGHT) WELCOMING PRIME MINISTER OF TRINIDAD  AND TOBAGO, DR. ERIC WILLIAMS (SECOND RIGHT) IN MARCH 1964
image_headline: KENYATTA WELCOMES PRIME MINISTER OF TRINAD AND TOBAGO
image_caption: PART OF ENTHUSIASTIC CROWD WHICH WENT TO NAIROBI AIRPORT TO GREET THE PRIME MINISTER OF TRINIDAD AND TOBAGO. DR. ERIC WILLIAMS, WHO IS SEEN ON THE RIGHT FLANKED BY THE PRIME MINISTER, MR. JOMO KENYATTA, AND THE MINISTER OF JUSTICE,MR. T. MBOYA.
image_keywords: 1398/422,PRIME MINISTER JOMO KENYATTA, MINISTER OF JUSTICE MR. TOM MBOYA, PRIME MINISTER OF TRINIDAD AND TOBAGO,DR. ERIC WILLIAMS
